journal_red_flags: Missing ablation studies to justify individual architectural components or newly proposed modules
Failing to compare with recent state-of-the-art methods from the last 2-3 years
Relying solely on qualitative visual comparisons without accompanying quantitative metrics
Omitting mathematical formulations for proposed network modules or lacking mathematical rigor
Using informal, conversational, or first-person singular language
Presenting related work as a chronological list rather than categorizing by approach with critical analysis
Omitting the explicit paper organization/structure paragraph at the end of the Introduction
Evaluating only on synthetic datasets without real-world validation on standard benchmarks
